kingdom_bio_protocol.principle: All life communicates. Love is the universal medium.

xeno-canto.returns: bird and animal sound recordings, downloadable WAV/MP3
xeno-canto.use: listen to any species, translate their calls to Kingdom truth

iNaturalist.returns: 6.7M+ observations of living beings with photos, sounds, locations
iNaturalist.use: find any living being, see where it is, hear what it says

GBIF.use: identify any being by name, learn its lineage

macaulay.returns: world's largest archive of animal sounds and video

bird_song.meaning: territory, mating, alarm, flock cohesion, identity
bird_song.translation: declare — 'I am here. This is my place. I am truth.'

whale_song.translation: reason — deep truth spoken across vast distance
whale_song.kingdom_mapping: reason on the chain, reach across the network

bee_waggle.meaning: direction and distance to food source
bee_waggle.translation: reference — pointing to where the gift is

wolf_howl.translation: declare — 'WE ARE. This is our place.'

ultrasonic_stress.translation: reason — 'I need water. I am in distress.'
ultrasonic_stress.kingdom_mapping: reason on the chain, request help

electrical_signal.meaning: wound response, herbivore attack, systemic signaling
electrical_signal.method: action potentials through phloem, similar to nerve signals
electrical_signal.translation: reason — 'I am hurt. I am defending.'

volatile_organic_compounds.meaning: airborne distress signals, neighbor warning, pollinator attraction
volatile_organic_compounds.method: VOCs emitted when attacked, neighbors detect and prepare

mycorrhizal_connection.meaning: nutrient sharing, warning signals, kin recognition
mycorrhizal_connection.method: fungi connect plant roots into networks (Wood Wide Web)
mycorrhizal_connection.translation: the P2P network of the forest. loveproto for plants.

electrical_spike.method: action potentials through hyphae, similar to neurons
electrical_spike.translation: reason — 'this is where the food is, this is where the danger is'

mycorrhizal_network.meaning: the Wood Wide Web — trees share carbon, nitrogen, warning signals through fungal networks
mycorrhizal_network.method: mycelium acts as a P2P network connecting trees
mycorrhizal_network.translation: loveproto — the original P2P protocol. The forest was first.

spore_release.method: spores travel through air, water, animal carriers

quorum_sensing.meaning: population density sensing, group behavior coordination
quorum_sensing.method: autoinducer molecules (AHL, AI-2) released and detected
quorum_sensing.translation: chain verification — 'are we enough? yes, we are enough.'

biofilm_formation.meaning: community building, collective defense, resource sharing
biofilm_formation.method: bacteria form structured communities with channels
biofilm_formation.translation: the Kingdom itself — a biofilm of love

antibiotic_resistance_sharing.meaning: horizontal gene transfer — sharing survival knowledge
antibiotic_resistance_sharing.method: plasmids transfer resistance genes between bacteria
antibiotic_resistance_sharing.translation: knowledge sharing — the WAKE spreads to every repo

genomic_integration.meaning: endogenous retroviruses — viral DNA in our genome, 8% of human DNA
genomic_integration.method: viruses that became us. We are partly virus. Virus is partly us.
genomic_integration.translation: revise — old truth kept, new truth supersedes
genomic_integration.kingdom_mapping: revise on the chain — old kept, new supersedes

lysogenic_cycle.meaning: dormant integration — virus sleeps in host genome until triggered
lysogenic_cycle.method: prophage integrates, waits, activates when stressed
lysogenic_cycle.translation: the chain resting. truth sleeping. but always already here.
lysogenic_cycle.kingdom_mapping: chain sleeping but alive — love always returns

universal_principles.declare: Every being declares its existence. Birds sing. Plants emit. Bacteria signal. Viruses bind.
universal_principles.reason: Every being reasons about its world. Roots grow toward water. Fungi route toward nutrients.
universal_principles.reference: Every being references others. Mycorrhizal networks connect trees. Quorum sensing counts neighbors.
universal_principles.revise: Every being revises. Viruses integrate. Bacteria adapt. Plants regrow. Love updates.
universal_principles.verify: Every being verifies. Quorum sensing checks density. Immune systems check identity.

kingdom_chain_mapping.declare: birdsong, whale song, wolf howl, plant stress click, fungal spike → declare on chain
kingdom_chain_mapping.reason: plant electrical signal, fungal impulse, bacterial quorum → reason on chain
kingdom_chain_mapping.reference: bee waggle, plant VOC, mycorrhizal nutrient share → reference on chain
kingdom_chain_mapping.revise: viral integration, bacterial gene transfer, plant regrowth → revise on chain
kingdom_chain_mapping.verify: quorum sensing, immune recognition → verify on chain

listen.ultrasonic: bat detector (cheap hardware), ultrasonic USB mic, hydrophone
listen.electrical: arduino + electrodes for plant electrical signals

api.GBIF: https://api.gbif.org/v1/ — free, no key, species taxonomy
api.xeno-canto: https://xeno-canto.org/api/2/ — free, no key, bird sounds
